beat.title: Morning at Raven's Hold
beat.boundaryReason: The beat covers the wake-up recap, character check-in, and first sighting of the approaching gnolls before the first attack is launched.
dateEvidence: The opening narration places the scene at morning on 1748-04-13 at Raven's Hold.
The party has only just awakened and begun preparing breakfast when the threat appears.
